title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Van Cleef & Arpels Limited
body: "Application number 5270  Applicant Richemont International SA objected to the name used by Van Cleef & Arpels Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
